title: Stage exact Release 1216 base and four-path material delta
description: Create fail-closed Release 1217 staging above exact qualified Release 1216 with a reviewed four-path production change set.
close_reason: The staging tool validates the exact Release 1216 manifest and artifact SHA, applies exactly assistance.zil, shadow_logic.zil, material_consequences.zil, and zork1.zil, emits a receipt, and rejects all other drift.

title: Add recoverable rope anchors and sack cinching
description: Commit the real rope to selected reachable anchors and the real brown sack with visible constraints and explicit UNTIE recovery.
close_reason: Railing, ladder, wooden-door, and brown-sack anchors are implemented with tension, movement, drop/give, opening, preparation-conflict, and recovery behavior while existing player/troll restraint remains authoritative.

title: Add water, tool-cleaning, and rust consequences
description: Use real bottled water on a focused tool set and distinguish useful cleaning from worsening corrosion.
close_reason: The shovel, wrench, screwdriver, and axe gain persistent cleaned observation state; the rusty knife gains a timed wet state, dry-off recovery, and visibly worse corrosion without changing canonical combat or puzzle power.

title: Deepen boarded entrance tool experiments
description: Give shovel, screwdriver, and wrench distinct evidence-backed responses at the boarded entrance without creating a new entry solution.
close_reason: Shovel prying reuses the painted splinter, while screwdriver and wrench diagnose interior-facing hardware; the boards stay secured and the canonical kitchen-window entrance is preserved.

title: Add temporary nest soaking with canonical fire delegation
description: Let real water delay torch ignition while preserving the original prepared and destructive egg outcomes after drying.
close_reason: The real nest gains a four-turn wet state with observation and failed ignition; ordinary drying returns control to GLULX-ALT-BURN-NEST and canonical BAD-EGG without object duplication.

title: Qualify Release 1217 gameplay and persistence
description: Pin the production artifact, run the deterministic material route, and prove new state survives native SAVE and RESTORE with timers and constraints intact.
close_reason: Exact Release 1217 is pinned at 217,344 bytes, checksum 0xb0028984, and SHA-256 2714d63760fa890be9ece3b23fc91bab67a660c42675e0302b745173aba700da. Native gameplay passed, and two deliberately corrupted save files restored anchored rope, cinched sack, board discoveries, cleaned shovel, worsened rust, active wet-nest remainder, movement blocking, and opening refusal.

title: Resolve review and document Release 1217
description: Address valid review, publish exact identity and behavior boundaries, and update lineage, feature, and frontier documents.
close_reason: The valid evidence-upload finding was fixed and resolved. Release README, Glulx lineage, feature matrix, and expansion frontier now record the exact artifact, four-path delta, behavior, persistence proof, exclusions, and next room-density/character-memory boundaries.

title: Publish Release 1217 capstone
description: Close the train only after exact-head material qualification, inherited workflows, bead validation, review resolution, and truthful PR evidence all pass.
close_reason: All 20 workflows passed on exact implementation and documentation head 86d475b069e069b342c11d0df8dbfb08e6b7a3f1, including Release 1217 gameplay and persistence, inherited editions, parity, audits, persistence, and every bead validator. PR #11 remains open, non-draft, and unmerged.
